text.message: idk why red didnt go for that spot
no wheat and no port if i do
how early is too early for random table talk?
some would say solo this early is a mistake
yeah, i know.  wish you had a different port to go for
don't you all love it when the leader complains about being blocked.  lol
leader? I thought jesus is our one true leader
at what point dear leader may we solo you
lol now the solo is just bad play
please tell me how to play green.  where should i block?
subscribe to my yt channel for that
i bet good play is blocking anyone but you.
